strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, with current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq

Founder of GISCollective, an open source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes and used by Green Map — demonstrating entrepreneurial, product-building capability within a sustained long-term initiative

Track record of technical leadership and thought sharing: conference talks (FOSS4G), full-day Web Internals and Selenium courses, Refactoring Dojos at National Instruments, and craftsmanship practices (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development) applied at scale
concerns: Current title is Staff Software Engineer rather than Principal/Director-level IC, with limited explicit evidence of org-wide strategic influence at that altitude
AI-related experience is recent (since April 2025) rather than a long-established specialty with shipped AI products at scale
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field listed among the preferred qualifications

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience
15+ years polyglot engineering across cloud, web, mobile, and embedded
Founder of GISCollective + community teaching demonstrating entrepreneurial and influence skills

response.justification: Bogdan brings exactly the rare combination this role calls for: 15+ years of deep, polyglot engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and high-throughput micro-services (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second), paired with current, hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq. His founding of GISCollective — a Kubernetes-deployed open source platform adopted by Green Map — evidences the entrepreneurial, builder mindset the role prizes, while his conference talks, multi-module Selenium course, Web Internals workshop, and Refactoring Dojos show he already inspires technical communities internally and externally. Combined with disciplined craftsmanship (TDD, pairing, CI/CD) and proven full-stack fluency across TypeScript, Node, DLang, and cloud, he is well positioned to identify, prototype, and evangelize AI-driven differentiation opportunities.
